summary: E-commerce platform with ICP crypto payments and traditional payment support, integrating with Shopify storefront for clothing products (hoodies, apparel), with donation functionality
architectural_notes: Shopify integration via Storefront API for product data sync
ICP-powered checkout flow linked from Shopify buy buttons
Support for both traditional and ICP crypto payment methods

existing_features.title: Add a donation button to the store header navigation that is visible to all users
Create a donation page that allows users to enter a custom donation amount and select a payment method (Stripe or Coinbase ICP)
Add React Query hooks for donation operations including creating donations and fetching donation history
Add donation section to the Orders page showing user's donation history with amount, date, and payment method

new_feature_requests.summary: Shopify Storefront API integration for product sync and checkout linking
Implement backend donation processing endpoint that creates a donation transaction record and handles payment processing through Stripe or Coinbase
